description_long: This is a compact hatchback car with a modern, angular design and a predominantly white exterior. The car features a distinctive red scorpion decal on the hood, adding a sporty and unique touch to its appearance. The windows are tinted black, and the wheels are dark gray with a multi-spoke pattern. The front of the car has a small grille and two round headlights, while the rear includes dual exhaust pipes and red taillights. The side profile reveals four passenger doors and a rear hatch, typical of urban hatchbacks. The overall build suggests a lightweight, city-friendly vehicle with a focus on style and practicality.
description: A white, modern hatchback car with a red scorpion decal on the hood, black-tinted windows, and dark gray wheels. It features four doors, a rear hatch, and sporty design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red scorpion decal on the hood, black windshield, and round headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door layout, dark wheels, and the scorpion decal partially visible on the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dual exhaust pipes, red taillights, and the rear hatch door.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four-door configuration and dark wheels, but without the scorpion decal visible.
